resources.string: This app shows the tablature for any song playing on your Spotify.
So you can follow along and play it on guitar :)
To do this, we need to connect to your Spotify. This way we can monitor which song is currently playing.
No sensitive information like password or login is shared with us.
Play a song on Spotify to get your tablature
Want to log out of Spotify?
You will need to sign in again to continue using the app.
No song being played at the moment
Error while logging in. Make sure you have an internet connection or that your login details are correct.
Error searching for tablature, please try again
Google service error, could not generate tablature link
, empty response. No song playing was detected.
